headline: Digi Power X signs $19.6M GPU rental agreement with SubQ AI
summary: Digi Power X Inc (NASDAQ:DGXX, FRA:1NQ0, NEO:DGX) announced that it has signed a 24-month GPU rental agreement valued at $19.6 million with SubQ AI, a company focused on next-generation AI technologies. Under the terms of the agreement, Digi Power X will provide SubQ AI with dedicated access...
